title: Racetrack
writer: J. Walter Ruben, Wells Root, Douglas Z. Doty
actors: Leo Carrillo, Frank Coghlan Jr., Kay Hammond
plot: Joe Tomasso is an Italian-American bookmaker and gambler who, outwardly, is hard but soft-hearted inwardly. He becomes fond of a homeless waif, Jackie Curtis, and begins to look upon him as the son he never had. But when Jackie's ...
